import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
mut sorted = true
match line
when Some(s)
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut i = 1
  mut prev = 0
  if n > 0
    match string.parse_int(tokens.get(0).ok_or(0)?)
    when Some(v)
      prev = v
    when None
      sorted = false
    end
  end
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        if v < prev
          sorted = false
        end
        prev = v
      when None
        sorted = false
      end
    when None
      sorted = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
when None
  sorted = true
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
